lessons_learned: Signal files (projects.json, open-loops.json, queue.json) remain empty - no tasks to dispatch
context-pack.md does not exist at expected path
No worker sessions should be spawned when prerequisite context is missing and all lightweight inputs are empty
Cron completion still requires updating state.json even for a no-op decision
Reruns for the same cron slot should only confirm state, not invent work when inputs are still empty
Completion-enforcement retries should still avoid spawning workers when the anti-stale scan and lightweight inputs yield zero dispatchable tasks
If a supervisor says the prior response did not complete, finish by rewriting state for the slot and returning only the final summary
Use full-file writes for state.json updates to avoid brittle exact-match edits during conductor cron runs
